{{RewardIconWithText|Coating Bucket|orange}} use to get random 20 Coatings (High chance of getting Blue or lower Coatings; small chance of getting Purple Coatings).

The drop rates are:
* 60% {{RewardIconWithText|Green Coating|green}}
* 25% {{RewardIconWithText|Blue Coating|blue}}
* 15% {{RewardIconWithText|Purple Coating|purple}}

Coatings are used to improve [[Shells]].

[[Category:Reward Pack]]
[[Category:Shells]]
